framework.name: Salesforce active in agent auth standards
framework.description: Json Ross, Product Security Principal at Salesforce, is co-authoring this CSA framework paper. This is direct evidence of Salesforce participation in agent authentication standards work — not IETF drafts specifically, but industry consortium (CSA) level.
framework.raw_quote: Json Ross4, Product Security Principal, Salesforce

source.title: A Novel Zero-Trust Identity Framework for Agentic AI - arXiv
